nasb.text: Jesus got up and went away from there to the region of Tyre. And when He had entered a house, He wanted no one to know of it; yet He could not escape notice.

esv.text: And from there he arose and went away to the region of Tyre and Sidon. And he entered a house and did not want anyone to know, yet he could not be hidden.

cnv.text: 耶穌從那裡動身到推羅境內去。進了一所房子，本來不想讓人知道，卻隱藏不住。

ccb.text: 耶稣从那里启程去泰尔和西顿地区。祂进了一户人家，原本不想让人知道，却无法避开人们的注意。

csbs.text: 耶稣起身离开那地方到提尔和西顿地区。他进了一户人家，本来不愿意任何人知道，却还是不能避开众人。
